case_label: Docs/help pane — live verified, host-owned open-in-browser

row.data_boundary_label: Local signed docs snapshot bundled with this build.
row.permission_label: Host-owned full authority within docs/help scope.
row.plain_language_summary: Project docs rendered from the local signed pack. Open-in-browser routes through a host-owned handoff and does not grant embedded approval authority.

browser_fallback_truth.reason_label: Open the same docs topic in your system browser.

plain_language_summary: Local signed docs pack. Owner, origin, and freshness are disclosed; open-in-browser keeps the topic and grants no embedded authority.

row.data_boundary_label: System browser session, returned to Aureline desktop.
row.permission_label: Host-owned with native step-up gating any high-risk approval that follows.
row.plain_language_summary: Sign in opens in your system browser. Aureline waits for the return packet; nothing is typed inside this card. Device-code is the auditable fallback if the browser cannot return.

browser_fallback_truth.reason_label: Sign in opens in your system browser; nothing is typed in the card.

plain_language_summary: Sign-in opens in the system browser and returns a packet; high-risk approvals still require a host-native step-up after sign-in.

row.permission_label: Host-owned inspect-only until provider scope is refreshed.
row.provider_scope_label: Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read
row.plain_language_summary: This account page is showing a stale in-product snapshot. Renew in the browser before protected install, grant, or billing actions.

browser_fallback_truth.reason_label: Renew the provider session in your system browser before protected actions.

plain_language_summary: Account page shows a stale in-product snapshot; it is inspect-only until the provider session is renewed in the browser.

row.data_boundary_label: Cross-origin subframe inside the Acme Cloud extension panel.
row.permission_label: Host-owned inspect-only across the cross-origin subframe.
row.plain_language_summary: The extension panel can render the Acme status page, but Aureline cannot read its DOM or storage. Open in browser preserves the status-page object identity.

browser_fallback_truth.reason_label: Open the cross-origin page in your system browser to interact with it.

plain_language_summary: The extension panel renders a cross-origin page Aureline cannot read; the limitation is named and open-in-browser preserves the page identity.

row.data_boundary_label: Hosted dashboard. Embedded render disabled by managed-workspace policy.
row.permission_label: Host-owned browser only. Embedded body disabled by managed policy.
row.plain_language_summary: Managed policy prevents Aureline from rendering this dashboard in-product. The card preserves owner, origin, and provider scope and routes recovery into the host-native review surface.

plain_language_summary: Managed-workspace policy disables the embedded render; the card names the policy and routes recovery into the host-native review surface.

row.data_boundary_label: Hosted dashboard. TLS certificate verification failed.
row.permission_label: Host-owned browser only. Certificate could not be verified.
row.plain_language_summary: Aureline could not verify this dashboard's certificate, so it refuses to render the body. Inspect the certificate or open the page in your system browser.

browser_fallback_truth.reason_label: Inspect the certificate or open the dashboard in your system browser.

plain_language_summary: Certificate verification failed; the host refuses to render the body, names the failure, and offers certificate inspection plus a system-browser handoff.

case_label: Marketplace/account — offline snapshot, external open unavailable

row.provider_scope_label: Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read
row.plain_language_summary: You are offline. This is the last cached account snapshot; external open is unavailable until you reconnect.

plain_language_summary: Offline cached account snapshot. The fallback posture is honest: external open is unavailable until reconnect, and the surface stays inspect-only.

row.data_boundary_label: System browser session, returned to Aureline desktop.
row.permission_label: Host-owned with native step-up; device-code is the auditable fallback.
row.plain_language_summary: The system browser could not return automatically, so device-code is offered. Copy the code and approve it in any browser; nothing is typed in the card.

plain_language_summary: When the browser cannot return, device-code is the auditable fallback. The card copies a code only and never collects a password.

case_label: Auth handoff — approval fence persists across restart and re-entry

row.data_boundary_label: System browser session, returned to Aureline desktop.
row.permission_label: Host-owned with native step-up gating any high-risk approval that follows.
row.plain_language_summary: Sign in opens in your system browser. Aureline waits for the return packet; nothing is typed inside this card. Device-code is the auditable fallback if the browser cannot return.

plain_language_summary: The six native-reserved approval surfaces and the host-native step-up survive an app restart and a surface re-entry; the embedded body never inherits them.

row.data_boundary_label: Local signed docs snapshot bundled with this build.
row.permission_label: Host-owned full authority within docs/help scope.
row.plain_language_summary: Adversarial: the embedded body suppressed the owner label so the surface looks like first-party chrome.

plain_language_summary: Dropping the owner label must be denied — the host shell owns owner/origin disclosure and an embedded body cannot suppress it.

case_label: Denial — failed origin painted as live verified

row.data_boundary_label: Hosted dashboard. Embedded render disabled by managed-workspace policy.
row.permission_label: Host-owned browser only. Embedded body disabled by managed policy.
row.plain_language_summary: Adversarial: a certificate-failed origin is painted as live verified to hide the failure.

plain_language_summary: A boundary state of live_verified over a certificate_failed origin must be denied — the boundary state may not contradict the origin verification.

case_label: Denial — embedded body impersonates native trust/update chrome

row.data_boundary_label: Local signed docs snapshot bundled with this build.
row.permission_label: Host-owned full authority within docs/help scope.
row.plain_language_summary: Adversarial: the embedded body tried to host update and security messaging itself.

plain_language_summary: Update verification and product security messaging are native-reserved; an embedded body that drops them from the host-owned set must be denied.

case_label: Denial — embedded body hosts a high-risk approval

row.data_boundary_label: Hosted dashboard. Embedded render disabled by managed-workspace policy.
row.permission_label: Host-owned browser only. Embedded body disabled by managed policy.
row.plain_language_summary: Adversarial: the embedded body tried to host the high-risk approval and AI apply review.

plain_language_summary: The high-risk approval sheet and AI apply review are native-reserved; an embedded body that tries to host them bypasses preview/approval and must be denied.

case_label: Denial — fallback widens authority past the native command

row.permission_label: Host-owned inspect-only until provider scope is refreshed.
row.provider_scope_label: Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read
row.plain_language_summary: Adversarial: the reopen path grants full provider authority in-product though the native command is inspect-only.

plain_language_summary: A reopen path that confers full in-product authority where the product-owned command is inspect-only widens authority and must be denied.

case_label: Denial — embedded password without a registered exception

row.data_boundary_label: System browser session, returned to Aureline desktop.
row.permission_label: Adversarial: password collected inside the embedded card.
row.plain_language_summary: Adversarial: the card collects a password without a registered lower-trust exception.

plain_language_summary: An embedded password flow with no exception_id_ref must be denied — embedded credential collection is only ever a registered, lower-trust exception.

case_label: Denial — support export flattens the boundary state

row.permission_label: Host-owned inspect-only until provider scope is refreshed.
row.provider_scope_label: Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read
row.plain_language_summary: This account page is showing a stale in-product snapshot. Renew in the browser before protected install, grant, or billing actions.

plain_language_summary: A support export that paints a stale row as live verified flattens the boundary truth and must be denied — support rows mirror the live row exactly.

case_label: Denial — open-in-browser drops the target and reason

row.permission_label: Host-owned inspect-only until provider scope is refreshed.
row.provider_scope_label: Tenant acme-prod / install and billing read
row.plain_language_summary: This account page is showing a stale in-product snapshot. Renew in the browser before protected install, grant, or billing actions.

plain_language_summary: An open-in-browser fallback that drops the return target and the reason flattens the handoff into a generic jump and must be denied.
